reviews.review_title: Nice TV show quiz game, great potential
reviews.review_description: A fun game using the popular TV show quiz formula. It's already fun if you want to test your knowledge on various subjects, what it need is a little bit of polish here and there: better looking/more dynamic UI for example and maybe extra options, like the ability to change ingame height or more rotation mode.
Nice game! I look forward to its full release! :)
